description_long: This stuffed toy is a bear with a striking split-color design, where the left half is white and the right half is black. The face features a playful yet mischievous expression, with a wide, toothy grin and a red, jagged eye on the black side, while the white side has a simple black eye and a round nose. The body is plump and rounded, with short arms and legs, and a small, circular belly button detail on the lower front. The back of the toy continues the split-color theme, with a clean division running vertically down the center. The surface appears soft and plush, typical of a stuffed toy, and the overall form is cartoonish and inviting. This toy would likely attract attention in an urban setting due to its bold, contrasting colors and expressive face.
description: A split-color bear stuffed toy with a mischievous grin, featuring a white left side and a black right side, and a red jagged eye on the black half. The plush, rounded body and bold facial features make it visually striking.
description_view_0: Front view showing the split-color face, wide grin, red jagged eye, and circular belly button.
description_view_1: Right side view dominated by the black half, with the red eye and grin partially visible, and the back leg extended.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the vertical split between black and white, with both ears and arms visible.
description_view_3: Left side view dominated by the white half, showing the simple black eye and nose, and the back arm and leg.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is mischievous and playful, with a wide, toothy grin and a red, jagged eye on the black side, while the white side has a simple, round black eye and a small nose.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with both arms slightly bent and legs apart, giving a lively and approachable posture.
